strengths: 10+ years of full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, DLang, etc.)
Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB with recent roles in enterprise automation tooling
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, core stack requirements for the role
No clear evidence of working with relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) in recent roles
Short tenure (2-3 months) at current role may indicate job-hopping or lack of long-term commitment

key_factors.factor: Stack alignment with required secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java)

response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong TypeScript/Node.js experience in recent roles (e.g., re:cinq, Optilyz) and has hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure. However, there is no evidence of working with Nest.js (a core stack requirement) or Vitest. While they have experience with MongoDB, there is no mention of relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL), which are explicitly required. The short tenure at their current role is also a concern.
